findings.description: Header layout collapsed, merging left and right aligned elements.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'Distribution Report for' and 'Distribution Date' are separated horizontally on opposite sides of the page. The HTML concatenates them into a single line: 'Distribution Report for Distribution Date'. The quarterly date and report date on the next line suffer the same incorrect merging.

findings.description: Loss of visual hierarchy in headings and text alignment in tables.
findings.evidence: The main document titles ('Utilities Sales Distribution') lost bolding and center-alignment. Additionally, currency and numerical values in the table are right-aligned in the PDF but default to left-alignment in the HTML across the entire document.
